---
title: "HPB_spinup"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-12"
---


docker run -v C:/Users/dwh18/OneDrive/Desktop/R_projects/RHESSys_Tutorial:/RHESSys/repo -it rhessys/rhessys:develop



## run using run_rhessys command 
this is for HPB_files_NEW folder that uses the kmeans500 patches 

```{r}
#Can run all of this within the Docker container after opening R

setwd("repo/HPB_files_NEW")
library(RHESSysIOinR)

dates = c("1950 1 1 1", "2500 1 2 24") #has to end with a 24 hour so that the tec output will work

name = "hpb_spinup"

## possible way to pull best world file
# Use your best current .state file as starting point
# worldfile_start = tail(list.files("worldfiles", pattern = "\\.state", full.names = TRUE), 1)
# message("Starting from: ", worldfile_start) ## would then set world)file in input rhessys to worldfile_start

input_rhessys = IOin_rhessys_input(
  version          = "../../rhessys7.5",
  tec_file         =  paste0("tecfiles/",name,".tec"), #for using tecfile built below
  world_file       = "worldfiles/hpb.world", #what was made in pre-processing
  world_hdr_prefix = "hpb_spintest",
  flowtable        = "flowtables/hpb.flow", #what was made in pre-processing
  start            = dates[1],
  end              = dates[2],
  output_folder    = "out/",
  output_prefix    = "HPB_spinup550yr_multiT3",
  commandline_options = "-b -g -climrepeat" 
)

#header directly copied from hpb.hdr
input_hdr = IOin_hdr(
  basin      = "defs/basin.def",
  hillslope  = "defs/hill.def",
  zone       = "defs/zone.def",
  soil       = "defs/soil_siltyloam.def",
  landuse    = "defs/lu_undev.def",
  stratum    = "defs/veg_deciduous.def",
  basestations = "clim/ccr_base"
)

#p0 = c("epc.root_distrib_parm", "epc.min_percent_leafg", "epc.branch_turnover", "epc.froot_turnover", 
#       "epc.leaf_turnover", "epc.livewood_turnover", "epc.gl_c", "epc.gl_smax", "epc.proj_sla")

#where you can manually tweak params
# pars_list = list(
#   # list(def_file_path,       "parameter_name",    value) 
#   list(input_hdr$stratum_def[1], "epc.root_distrib_parm", 18), #default is 8 in deciduous
#   list(input_hdr$stratum_def[1], "epc.leaf_turnover", 1), #default is 1 in deciduous; range is 0-1: %  leaves that die each year
#   list(input_hdr$stratum_def[1], "epc.livewood_turnover", 0.7) #default is 0.7 in deciduous
#   # add as many as you need in the same format
# )


# pars_list = list(list(input_hdr$stratum_def[1], "epc.root_distrib_parm",    c(1, 8, 20)),
#   list(input_hdr$stratum_def[1], "epc.leaf_turnover", c(0.1, 0.5, 1)))

pars_list = list(
  
  list(input_hdr$stratum_def[1], "epc.root_distrib_parm",    c(20, 20, 20)),
  list(input_hdr$stratum_def[1], "epc.leaf_turnover", c(1, 1, 1)),
  
  
  # --- Reduce plant C accumulation ---
  
  # Increase wood turnover to remove structural C faster (default 0.7, try higher)
  list(input_hdr$stratum_def[1], "epc.livewood_turnover",   c(0.7, 0.85, 1.0)),
  
  # Turn on branch turnover (default is 0.0 = off)
  list(input_hdr$stratum_def[1], "epc.branch_turnover",     c(0.0, 0.1, 0.25)),
  
  # # Reduce stem allocation relative to leaves (default 1.62)
  # # lower = less structural C accumulation
  # list(input_hdr$stratum_def[1], "epc.alloc_stemc_leafc",   c(0.8, 1.2, 1.62)),
  # 
  # # Cap NSC storage pool (default 0.2) — lower = less C hoarded in plant
  # list(input_hdr$stratum_def[1], "epc.max_storage_percent",  c(0.1, 0.15, 0.2)),
  
  # --- Increase soil C inputs ---
  
  # Fine root turnover is major soil C pathway (default 0.27, try higher)
  list(input_hdr$stratum_def[1], "epc.froot_turnover",      c(0.27, 0.5, 0.8))
  
  # # Leaf turnover feeds litter → soil (you found this didn't matter much,
  # # but worth including at higher end given soil C deficit)
  # list(input_hdr$stratum_def[1], "epc.leaf_turnover",       c(0.5, 0.75, 1.0))
)

input_def_pars = IOin_def_pars_simple(pars_list)

#set up manually tweak params for rhessys format; can also put multi here
input_def_pars = IOin_def_pars_simple(pars_list)
#when you run this it will geneate new folders within def called zone, soil, etc, that have updated def file values, but doesn't change orignial files


#make tec file locally
input_tec_data = IOin_tec_std(start = dates[1], end = dates[2], output_state = T)



#run model with inputs defined above
# run_rhessys_single(
#   input_rhessys = input_rhessys,
#   hdr_files     = input_hdr,
#   tec_data      = input_tec_data, #set in input rhessys; can be NULL if calling a local file and not using IOin_tec_std
#   def_pars      = input_def_pars,
#   output_filter = NULL, #cant get any version working currently so using legacy output 
#   return_cmd    = F   # flip to FALSE to run
# )


#run for multi param
run_rhessys_multi(
  input_rhessys   = input_rhessys,
  hdr_files       = input_hdr,
  tec_data        = input_tec_data,
  def_pars        = input_def_pars,
  output_filter   = NULL,
  all_combinations = FALSE,   # paired not grid; grid would run all combos of inputs list
  return_cmd      = F
)

##seems like it runs by pair for each year: ie 57,57,57, 58,58,58 . at some point it seems to get off tho.. ie 2272, 2259, 2237
## started ~632 - 657




```



## look at output


```{r}
##functin to read in and plot quickly

library(RHESSysIOinR)
library(tidyverse)


read_plot_rhessys = function(outname, date_filter = NULL, ncol = 3,
                              vars = c("lai.x", "plantc.x", "soilc", "plantn",
                                       "streamflow", "unsat_stor",
                                       "streamflow_DON", "streamflow_DOC", "streamflow_NO3")) {
  
  dat = readin_rhessys_output(outname)
  
  out = left_join(dat$bd, dat$bdg,
                  by = c("day", "month", "year", "basinID", "wy", "yd", "date"))
  
  if (!is.null(date_filter)) out = out |> filter(date > date_filter)
  
  out |>
    select(date, year, yd, any_of(vars)) |>
    pivot_longer(-c(date, year, yd)) |>
    ggplot(aes(x = date, y = value)) +
    geom_point() +
    facet_wrap(~name, scales = "free_y", ncol = ncol) +
    labs(title = outname, x = "Date", y = NULL) +
    theme_bw()
}

# read_plot_rhessys(outname = "out/Trial1/HPB_spinup350yr_multi_run1", date_filter = NULL)


```




## Latin cube trial 

LHS with RHESSys multi

```{r}

library(lhs)          # install.packages("lhs")
library(RHESSysIOinR)
library(tidyverse)
library(data.table)

setwd("repo/HPB_files_NEW")


# -------------------- Define parameter ranges --------------------
param_ranges = list(
  epc.root_distrib_parm = c(1,     20),  #8 
  epc.alloc_stemc_leafc = c(1,   5),  # 2.2
  epc.livewood_turnover = c(0.15,   0.9), # 0.7
  epc.froot_turnover    = c(0.4,   1),  # 1
  epc.branch_turnover   = c(0.01,  0.2),  #0
  DOM_decay_rate        = c(0.01, 0.1)  #0.05
)

n_params = length(param_ranges)
n_runs   = 24  #have 14 cores to work with; have been running in batches of 12 for this

# -------------------- Generate LHS design --------------------
set.seed(42)
lhs_raw    = randomLHS(n_runs, n_params)
lhs_scaled = as.data.frame(lhs_raw)
colnames(lhs_scaled) = names(param_ranges)

for (p in names(param_ranges)) {
  lo = param_ranges[[p]][1]
  hi = param_ranges[[p]][2]
  lhs_scaled[[p]] = lo + lhs_scaled[[p]] * (hi - lo)
}

print(head(lhs_scaled))
print(summary(lhs_scaled))

# -------------------- Setup --------------------

dates          = c("1950 1 1 1", "2200 1 2 24")
name           = "hpb_LHS"

input_rhessys = IOin_rhessys_input(
  version          = "../../rhessys7.5",
  tec_file         = paste0("tecfiles/", name, ".tec"),
  world_file       = "worldfiles/hpb.world",
  world_hdr_prefix = name,
  flowtable        = "flowtables/hpb.flow",
  start            = dates[1],
  end              = dates[2],
  output_folder    = "out/LHS_T1",
  output_prefix    = name,
  commandline_options = "-b -g -climrepeat"
)

input_hdr = IOin_hdr(
  basin        = "defs/basin.def",
  hillslope    = "defs/hill.def",
  zone         = "defs/zone.def",
  soil         = "defs/soil_siltyloam.def",
  landuse      = "defs/lu_undev.def",
  stratum      = "defs/veg_deciduous.def",
  basestations = "clim/ccr_base"
)

input_tec_data = IOin_tec_std(start = dates[1], end = dates[2], 
                               output_state = FALSE)

# -------------------- Pass full vectors to run_rhessys_multi --------------------
# No [i] indexing — pass the entire column as a vector
pars_list = list(
  ## set hydro parameters
  list(input_hdr$soil_def[1], "m", 0.108),
  list(input_hdr$soil_def[1], "Ksat_0",  404.3),
  list(input_hdr$soil_def[1], "sat_to_gw_coeff",  0.1),
  list(input_hdr$hillslope_def[1], "gw_loss_coeff", 0.9),
  
  ## sampled LHS veg and soil params
  list(input_hdr$stratum_def[1], "epc.root_distrib_parm", lhs_scaled$epc.root_distrib_parm),
  list(input_hdr$stratum_def[1], "epc.alloc_stemc_leafc",  lhs_scaled$epc.alloc_stemc_leafc),
  list(input_hdr$stratum_def[1], "epc.livewood_turnover",  lhs_scaled$epc.livewood_turnover),
  list(input_hdr$stratum_def[1], "epc.froot_turnover",     lhs_scaled$epc.froot_turnover),
  list(input_hdr$stratum_def[1], "epc.branch_turnover",    lhs_scaled$epc.branch_turnover),
  list(input_hdr$soil_def[1],    "DOM_decay_rate",          lhs_scaled$DOM_decay_rate)
)

input_def_pars = IOin_def_pars_simple(pars_list)

# -------------------- Run --------------------
run_rhessys_multi(
  input_rhessys    = input_rhessys,
  hdr_files        = input_hdr,
  tec_data         = input_tec_data,
  def_pars         = input_def_pars,
  output_filter    = NULL,
  all_combinations = FALSE,
  return_cmd       = F   # flip to FALSE to run
)

# -------------------- Save param table --------------------
lhs_scaled |>
  mutate(run = paste0(name, "_run", seq_len(n_runs))) |>
  write_csv("out/LHS_T1/lhs_parameter_table.csv")



```




evaluate LHS

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(data.table)
library(RHESSysIOinR)



# Find only the non-grow basin daily files to get base prefixes

#### UPDATE FILE PATH
out_files = list.files("out/LHS_trial5", pattern = "hpb_lhs_run.*basin\\.daily$", 
                        full.names = TRUE)
out_files = out_files[!grepl("grow", out_files)]  # exclude the grow files

all_ts = map_dfr(out_files, function(f) {
  
  # Base prefix is everything before _basin.daily
  # e.g. out/hpb_lhs_run001_basin.daily -> out/hpb_lhs_run001
  run_prefix = gsub("_basin\\.daily$", "", f)
  run        = gsub(".*/", "", run_prefix)
  
  message("Reading: ", run)
  
  dat = tryCatch(
    readin_rhessys_output(run_prefix),
    error = function(e) { 
      message("  Failed: ", e$message)
      return(NULL) 
    }
  )
  
  if (is.null(dat)) return(NULL)
  
  out = left_join(dat$bd, dat$bdg,
                  by = c("day", "month", "year", "basinID", "wy", "yd", "date"))
  
  out |>
    select(date, year, month, day,
           plantc = plantc.x,
           soilc,
           plantn,
           soiln,
           streamflow_DOC,
           streamflow_DON,
           streamflow_NO3,
           lai    = lai.x,
           unsat_stor, 
           sat_def,
           streamflow) |>
    mutate(soil_moisture =  sat_def - unsat_stor) |> 
    mutate(run = run)
})


# -------------------- Read data --------------------
#### UPDATE FILE PATH
param_table = read_csv("out/LHS_trial5/lhs_parameter_table.csv")


# -------------------- Scoring table (unchanged) --------------------
results = all_ts |>
  group_by(run) |>
  slice_tail(n = 365) |>
  summarise(
    mean_plantc     = max(plantc,     na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_soilc      = max(soilc,      na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_lai        = max(lai,         na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_streamflow = max(streamflow,  na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_streamflow_DOC = max(streamflow_DOC,  na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_streamflow_NO3 = max(streamflow_NO3,  na.rm = TRUE)
  ) |>
  left_join(param_table, by = "run") |>
  mutate(score = abs(mean_plantc - 15) + 
                 abs(mean_soilc  - 15)) |> #using 15 as target kg/m2 for both pools curretnly
  arrange(score)

print(head(results, 10))

# -------------------- Time series plot — all runs overlaid --------------------
# Color by score so best runs stand out
all_ts |>
  filter(date > ymd("2000-01-01")) |> 
  left_join(results |> select(run, score), by = "run") |>
  pivot_longer(cols = c(plantc, soilc, lai, streamflow_DOC, streamflow, soil_moisture),
               names_to = "variable", values_to = "value") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = as.Date(date), y = value, 
             group = run, color = score)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.6, linewidth = 0.3) +
  scale_color_viridis_c(direction = -1, name = "Score\n(lower=better)") +
  facet_wrap(~variable, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2) +
  labs(title = "LHS runs — full time series",
       subtitle = "Brighter lines = closer to target C stocks",
       x = "Date", y = NULL) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "right")

# -------------------- Highlight just the top N runs --------------------
top_n = 5

top_runs = results$run[1:top_n]

all_ts |>
  filter(run %in% top_runs) |>
  left_join(results |> select(run, score), by = "run") |>
  mutate(run_label = paste0(run, "\nscore=", round(score, 2))) |>
  pivot_longer(cols = c(plantc, soilc, lai, streamflow),
               names_to = "variable", values_to = "value") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = as.Date(date), y = value, color = run_label)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.5) +
  facet_wrap(~variable, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2) +
  labs(title    = paste("Top", top_n, "LHS runs by score"),
       subtitle = "Are stocks leveling off by end of run?",
       x = "Date", y = NULL, color = "Run") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

# -------------------- Stabilization check --------------------
# Compare mean of first vs last year to see if stocks are still drifting
all_ts |>
  left_join(results |> select(run, score), by = "run") |>
  group_by(run, score) |>
  mutate(run_year = year(as.Date(date)),
         first_year = min(run_year),
         last_year  = max(run_year)) |>
  summarise(
    plantc_start = mean(plantc[run_year == first_year], na.rm = TRUE),
    plantc_end   = mean(plantc[run_year == last_year],  na.rm = TRUE),
    soilc_start  = mean(soilc[run_year  == first_year], na.rm = TRUE),
    soilc_end    = mean(soilc[run_year  == last_year],  na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    plantc_drift = round(plantc_end - plantc_start, 3),
    soilc_drift  = round(soilc_end  - soilc_start,  3)
  ) |>
  arrange(score) |>
  select(run, score, plantc_start, plantc_end, plantc_drift, 
         soilc_start, soilc_end, soilc_drift) |>
  print(n = 20)


```


```{r}
all_ts |>
  filter(date > ymd("2200-01-01")) |> 
  filter(streamflow_DOC < 0.1) |> 
  left_join(results |> select(run, score), by = "run") |>
  pivot_longer(cols = c(plantc, soilc, lai, streamflow_DOC, streamflow, soil_moisture),
               names_to = "variable", values_to = "value") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = as.Date(date), y = value, 
             group = run, color = score)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.6, linewidth = 0.3) +
  scale_color_viridis_c(direction = -1, name = "Score\n(lower=better)") +
  facet_wrap(~variable, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2) +
  labs(title = "LHS runs — full time series",
       subtitle = "Brighter lines = closer to target C stocks",
       x = "Date", y = NULL) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "right")

```
